{"cards": [{"name": "Molten Berserker", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Berserker", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": "Fury flows through his veins like liquid fire.", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Keyword-only common red creature testing aggressive statlines. 3/2 haste menace for 3 mana provides good aggressive pressure. Haste allows immediate impact, menace makes it harder to block. Power level is appropriate for common - slightly above curve but requires two blockers."}, {"name": "Worldforge Dragon", "mana_cost": "{6}{R}{R}", "cmc": 8, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, trample
When ~ enters the battlefield, ~ deals damage equal to its power to any target.
{2}{R}: ~ gets +2/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": "Its breath shapes mountains and its wings stir hurricanes.", "power": "6", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Splashy mythic dragon with multiple abilities. Flying and trample provide evasion, ETB ability gives immediate impact by dealing 6+ damage, and activated ability allows for surprise lethal damage. The high mana cost and powerful effects are appropriate for mythic rarity."}, {"name": "Verdant Seeking", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "The forest calls to those who know how to listen.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple common sorcery testing library search templating. Follows standard template for basic land tutoring effects. Costed at 2 mana to be fair but accessible for mana fixing and ramp strategies. Single ability keeps complexity low for common."}, {"name": "Ironbark Trampler", "mana_cost": "{5}{G}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Its footsteps leave craters in the ancient stone paths.", "power": "7", "toughness": "5", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Big common creature testing the P/T ceiling. At 6 mana for 7/5 trample, it follows the guideline of P+T not exceeding CMC+3 too much (12 vs 9 guideline, but acceptable for a vanilla creature with just trample). Trample ensures the large body is meaningful in combat."}, {"name": "Wild Growth Nexus", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "Lands you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control four or more lands, draw a card.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Multi-ability enchantment testing static and triggered abilities. First ability provides mana fixing in green's wheelhouse. Second ability rewards ramping to 4+ lands with card draw, creating a build-around incentive. Complexity and power level appropriate for uncommon."}]}
